chosen_action.title: Stop measurement-hold packet refresh after same-window primary-repo-flat manual delivery

why_this_action.summary: The current bottleneck is still Codeberg-flat primary-repo conversion, and the live hold window had already delivered the primary-repo-flat handoff once. Refreshing that same packet again during the same review window is fake progress, so the highest-leverage truthful action was to fail closed in the manual-asset refresh path.
shared_findings_used: adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg remains flat and is still the primary success gate
marketing_workflow_audit_latest.json: same-family publisher overlap is still an active failure
drafts/marketing_execution_board_latest.md: no truthful do-now packet exists in the current review window
agents/marketing/logs/marketing_2026-05-28_025600_primary_repo_flat_manual_delivery.json: the primary-repo-flat packet was already delivered in this review window

result.summary: Patched the measurement-hold manual-asset refresher to suppress primary-repo-flat status-packet rewrites while a same-window manual delivery is still active, added regression coverage, and reran the full measurement-hold executor suite.
